title_en: Introduction to Be Patient! For Paradise Is Yours
content_en:
A motivational Islamic guide on the virtue of patience (sabr) in Islam, drawn from the Quran, Sunnah, and statements of the righteous predecessors. Patience is one of the most praised qualities in the Quran — mentioned over 90 times — and one of the highest spiritual stations for the believer.

The book covers the Quranic descriptions of the patient ones (sabirun), the rewards promised in this life and the next, the different types of patience (in obeying Allah, in abstaining from what He prohibited, and in accepting His decrees), and the stories of prophets and the Salaf as examples of extraordinary patience.

In an era of immediate gratification, constant distraction, and declining attention spans, this work reminds the believer that the hardships of this life are temporary trials, and that Paradise — with its eternal and incomparable pleasures — awaits those who endure with faith and continue in obedience to Allah. As the Prophet (peace be upon him) said: "The span of this world compared to the Hereafter is like what one of you puts his finger in the sea — let him see what he brings out."
